title: Xtra Spicy Polish Sausage Casserole
description: A jammy, molten, crowd-pleaser Polish dish featuring chilli and cure, friendly to dairy-free diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the Polish sausage over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the chilli flakes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, tomato sauce, and vegan mozzarella shreds.
Add the cooked sausage and vegetable mixture to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
